name: harmony-sase
description: MCP server for Check Point Harmony SASE

options.help: Harmony SASE API key. Generate from the Harmony SASE portal: Settings → API support → Generate API Key

options.description: Management host or IP for on-prem management
options.help: Your Harmony SASE management API URL (e.g., https://api.your-management-host.com/api). Found in the Harmony SASE portal under API settings
Port for the Harmony SASE management API. Default is 443
Your tenant origin domain (e.g., https://your.origin-domain.com). Found in your Harmony SASE tenant settings
